name: Launchable
description: Predictive test selection platform that uses machine learning on historical CI data to run only the most likely failing tests, shrinking pipeline time.

seo.title: Launchable — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Launchable: Predictive test selection platform that uses machine learning on historical CI data to run only the most likely failing tests, shrinking pipeline ti

when_to_use: ML-based test selection running only failing-risk tests
Reduce CI pipeline time by 50%+ with smart subsetting
Train models on historical test failure data in CI
Identify flaky tests early with predictive analytics

pros: ML-based predictive test selection, real CI savings
Flaky test detection and trends included
Integrates with most CI and test runners
cons: Requires reliable historical data to shine
Trusting ML-selected subsets needs culture change
Commercial pricing, ROI math is non-trivial
Less value for small or fast suites
review.verdict: Compelling CI optimizer once your suites are too big to run fully per change, a leap of faith otherwise.
review.best_for: Teams with multi-hour CI where wall-clock time blocks deploys
review.not_for: Small or already-fast suites where selection risk outweighs savings
